headline: Phillips 66 Announces Quarterly Dividend
summary: HOUSTON, April 17, 2026--The board of directors of Phillips 66 has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.27 per share on Phillips 66 common stock.

headline: GEVO: Attempting To Capture The Short Jet Fuel Market

headline: Energy Stocks Lose Wartime Gains
summary: U.S. energy stocks are falling on reports that the Strait of Hormuz was open to commercial traffic, further erasing gains from the first weeks of the war with Iran. Shares in fuel-refiner Phillips 66 and major oil companies Chevron and Exxon Mobil were all down about 6% in morning trading, which followed announcements from President Trump and the Iranian foreign minister declaring the strait open.

headline: Top Dividend Stocks To Consider In April 2026
summary: In the past week, the United States market has experienced a significant downturn with a 29% drop, contributing to an overall decline of 82% over the last year. In such volatile conditions, dividend stocks can offer some stability and income potential as investors look for companies with strong fundamentals and reliable earnings growth.

headline: Phillips 66 (PSX) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback And Strong Longer Term Returns
summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) is drawing attention after recent share price swings, with the stock down about 5% over the past month but still showing strong gains over the past 3 months and year. See our latest analysis for Phillips 66. The recent 5.4% 1 month share price pullback sits against an 18.1% 3 month share price return and a 70.9% 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests momentum has cooled while longer term holders have still been well rewarded. If you are weighing up energy names after...
